channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Audio-Technica’s limited-edition $199 gold turntable is the reason I’ll be waiting in line at 8am on Record Store Day
item.description: Audio-Technica’s limited AT-LP60XBT turntable in gold is an independent in-store exclusive, and if I don't manage to get one, my Record Store Day will be ruined.
item.dc:creator: becky.scarrott@futurenet.com (Becky Scarrott), TechRadar

item.title: How Apple thinks about the 6G evolution
item.description: With its C1 5G chip and huge networking tech development division, Apple is in the networking business. So, the company is heavily enmeshed in the development of the next-generation 6G networking standard.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Decision-making 101: How to get consensus right
item.description: IT leaders have five ways to make decisions. Their decision-making can be (1) Authoritarian; (2) Consultative; (3) through Delegation; (4) by submitting the alternatives to a Vote; or (5) by bringing the group to Consensus.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Microsoft workers say they've been fired after 50th anniversary protest over Israel contract
item.description: Microsoft has fired two employees who interrupted the company's 50th anniversary celebration to protest its work supplying artificial intelligence technology to the Israeli military, according to a group representing the workers.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kotlin, Swift, and Ruby losing popularity – Tiobe index
item.description: The Kotlin, Swift, and Ruby languages have slipped from their top 20 positions in the Tiobe index of programming language popularity. All three seem to have lost traction and to be in decline, according to Tiobe CEO Paul Jansen.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Stars at Breakthrough Prize buoy Silicon Valley moguls who embraced Trump
item.description: Amid Trump's tariffs and global economic turmoil, Gwyneth Paltrow, Katy Perry, Drew Barrymore, Gayle King, Kate Hudson and other stars partied with tech 'oligarchs' at the 'Billionaire's Ball'
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: AI could affect 40% of all jobs, UN says
item.description: The AI market could grow to as much as $4.8 trillion by 2033, according to a new report from the United Nations Conference on Trade and Development. At the same time, the money is expected to be concentrated among a few players and could increase inequality between countries, CNBC reports.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Google NotebookLM cheat sheet: Get fast insights into your docs
item.description: When Google first launched the NotebookLM beta in late 2023, the company billed it as an experimental note-taking app with a generative AI assistant built in. You can still use it to create notes, but the app has evolved into something much more novel and powerful.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Leadership, trust, and innovation: The keys to AI’s role in modern warfare
item.description: From ensuring the quality of data to fostering a culture of experimentation and adaptability, leaders must actively steer AI’s integration into operations. The post Leadership, trust, and innovation: The keys to AI’s role in modern warfare first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: A behind-the-scenes look at Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Nintendo's Switch 2 is bigger and better than its predecessor of eight years past as the video game developer pushes to bring its brand into “a new era" where social experiences are at the forefront.
item.dc:creator: RYAN KRYSKA, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Humanoid robot stuns with perfect side-flip acrobatics
item.description: Unitree, a Chinese robotics company that developed a backflipping robot, has now introduced a humanoid robot capable of doing a side flip.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Meta is fined by Turkey after refusing to restrict content on Facebook and Instagram
item.description: Meta said it has been hit with a hefty fine for resisting Turkish government demands to limit content on Facebook and Instagram.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Nintendo announces Switch 2 release date, new features in latest Direct showcase
item.description: And it's coming with a load of new features ranging from 4K, 120 frames per second support, a new LCD screen.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, NewsNation

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Google's new AI may know when your house is on fire
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why no one is challenging Trump's executive order that keeps TikTok running
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After TikTok was banned in the United States earlier this year, President Donald Trump gave the platform a reprieve, barreling past a law that was passed in Congress and upheld unanimously by the Supreme Court that said the ban was necessary for national security.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5
